spec.title: Accounts Without Subscriptions - Cache Hit Usage
spec.description: Shows accounts without active subscriptions that have remote cache hits, prioritized by usage for billing conversations

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
  a.name AS account_name,
  a.billing_email,
  a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count,
  ROUND((a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count / 200.0) * 100, 1) AS percent_of_limit,
  CASE 
    WHEN a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count >= 200 THEN 'EXCEEDED - Needs billing'
    WHEN a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count >= 180 THEN 'CRITICAL - 90%+ of limit'
    WHEN a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count >= 150 THEN 'HIGH - 75%+ of limit'
    WHEN a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count >= 100 THEN 'MEDIUM - 50%+ of limit'
    ELSE 'LOW - Under 50% limit'
  END AS billing_priority,
  a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count_updated_at AS last_updated
FROM public.accounts a
LEFT JOIN public.subscriptions s ON a.id = s.account_id AND s.status = 'active'
WHERE s.account_id IS NULL
  AND a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count > 0
ORDER BY a.current_month_remote_cache_hits_count DESC

SELECT
  "Accounts"."name" || '/' || "Projects"."name" AS "project_identifier",
  COUNT(*) AS "count"
FROM
  "public"."bundles"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."projects" AS "Projects" ON "public"."bundles"."project_id" = "Projects"."id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."accounts" AS "Accounts" ON "Projects"."account_id" = "Accounts"."id"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter("public"."bundles"."inserted_at")
GROUP BY
  "project_identifier"
ORDER BY
  "count" DESC,
  "project_identifier" ASC;

SELECT
  date_trunc('$bucket', b.inserted_at) AS time,
  'Total' AS label,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM public.bundles b
WHERE $__timeFilter(b.inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1

UNION ALL

SELECT
  date_trunc('$bucket', b.inserted_at) AS time,
  'CI' AS label,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM public.bundles b
WHERE b.git_ref IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(b.inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1

ORDER BY time, label;

WITH all_users AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', u.created_at) AS time,
    COUNT(*) AS count
  FROM public.users u
  GROUP BY 1
),
cumulative_users AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    'Users' AS label,
    SUM(count) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS value
  FROM all_users
),
all_orgs AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', o.created_at) AS time,
    COUNT(*) AS count
  FROM public.organizations o
  GROUP BY 1
),
cumulative_orgs AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    'Organizations' AS label,
    SUM(count) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS value
  FROM all_orgs
)

-- ✅ Only show values in the selected range, but accumulate across all time
SELECT * FROM cumulative_users WHERE time BETWEEN date_trunc('day', to_timestamp($__from / 1000)) AND date_trunc('day', to_timestamp($__to / 1000))
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM cumulative_orgs WHERE time BETWEEN date_trunc('day', to_timestamp($__from / 1000)) AND date_trunc('day', to_timestamp($__to / 1000))
ORDER BY time, label;

WITH project_counts AS (
 SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) AS project_count
 FROM projects
 GROUP BY account_id
)
SELECT
 project_count as "Projects per Account",
 COUNT(*) AS "Number of Accounts"
FROM project_counts
GROUP BY project_count
ORDER BY project_count;

spec.title: Most active accounts by runs
spec.description: Accounts with the most CLI/CI runs (command events) in the selected range. Sourced from ClickHouse command_events joined to the Postgres account map.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT project_id,
  count() AS runs,
  countIf(is_ci) AS ci_runs,
  countIf(NOT is_ci) AS local_runs
FROM command_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(ran_at)
GROUP BY project_id
ORDER BY runs DESC

SELECT p.id AS project_id, a.name AS account_handle,
  CASE WHEN a.organization_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Organization' ELSE 'Individual' END AS account_type,
  a.billing_email AS billing_email
FROM public.projects p JOIN public.accounts a ON p.account_id = a.id

SELECT
  "source"."project_identifier" AS "Project",
  "source"."count" AS "count"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "Accounts"."name" || '/' || "Projects"."name" AS "project_identifier",
      COUNT(*) AS "count"
    FROM
      "public"."previews"
      LEFT JOIN "public"."projects" AS "Projects" ON "public"."previews"."project_id" = "Projects"."id"
      LEFT JOIN "public"."accounts" AS "Accounts" ON "Projects"."account_id" = "Accounts"."id"
    WHERE
      $__timeFilter("public"."previews"."inserted_at")
    GROUP BY
      "project_identifier"
    ORDER BY
      "project_identifier" ASC
  ) AS "source"
ORDER BY
  "source"."count" DESC
LIMIT
  1048575;

spec.title: Accounts by Test Suite Runs
spec.description: Shows accounts sorted by the number of test suite runs in the selected time period, with billing contact information. Uses join transformation to combine ClickHouse test data with PostgreSQL account data.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    tr.account_id,
    count() AS test_suite_run_count
FROM default.test_suite_runs AS tsr
INNER JOIN default.test_runs AS tr ON tsr.test_run_id = tr.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(tsr.inserted_at)
GROUP BY tr.account_id
ORDER BY test_suite_run_count DESC

SELECT 
  id AS account_id,
  name AS account_name,
  billing_email
FROM public.accounts

spec.title: Total Gradle Projects
spec.description: Total number of projects using the Gradle build system

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Gradle Projects" FROM public.projects WHERE build_system = 1;

spec.title: Cumulative Gradle Projects
spec.description: Cumulative count of Gradle projects over time. Widen the time range to see data (all projects predate the last 6h window).

spec.rawSql:
SELECT created_at AS time,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS "Gradle Projects"
FROM public.projects
WHERE build_system = 1

UNION ALL

-- Anchor point at end of range so chart always shows current total
SELECT to_timestamp($__to / 1000) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Gradle Projects"
FROM public.projects
WHERE build_system = 1

ORDER BY time;

spec.title: Gradle Projects
spec.description: All projects using the Gradle build system

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  a.name || '/' || p.name::text AS "Project",
  p.created_at AS "Created"
FROM public.projects p
JOIN public.accounts a ON p.account_id = a.id
WHERE p.build_system = 1
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC;

spec.title: Organizations Without Subscriptions - Account Names
spec.description: Shows organizations without active subscriptions with their account names and member counts

spec.rawSql:
WITH org_with_subscriptions AS (
  -- Find organizations that have accounts with active subscriptions
  SELECT DISTINCT a.organization_id
  FROM public.accounts a
  INNER JOIN public.subscriptions s ON a.id = s.account_id 
  WHERE s.status = 'active'
    AND a.organization_id IS NOT NULL
    AND a.organization_id > 0
)
SELECT 
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT a.name::text, ', ') AS account_names,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) AS member_count,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT a.billing_email, ', ') FILTER (WHERE a.billing_email IS NOT NULL AND a.billing_email != '') AS billing_emails,
  o.created_at AS organization_created
FROM public.organizations o
LEFT JOIN public.accounts a ON o.id = a.organization_id
LEFT JOIN public.roles r ON o.id = r.resource_id AND r.resource_type = 'Organization'
LEFT JOIN public.users_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id
LEFT JOIN org_with_subscriptions ows ON o.id = ows.organization_id
WHERE ows.organization_id IS NULL -- No active subscriptions
GROUP BY o.id, o.created_at
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) > 0 -- Only orgs with actual members
ORDER BY member_count DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  "source"."Accounts__name" AS "Accounts__name",
  "source"."count" AS "count"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      "Accounts"."name" AS "Accounts__name",
      COUNT(*) AS "count"
    FROM
      "public"."previews"
      LEFT JOIN "public"."projects" AS "Projects" ON "public"."previews"."project_id" = "Projects"."id"
      LEFT JOIN "public"."accounts" AS "Accounts" ON "Projects"."account_id" = "Accounts"."id"
    WHERE
      $__timeFilter("public"."previews"."inserted_at")
    GROUP BY
      "Accounts"."name"
    ORDER BY
      "Accounts"."name" ASC
  ) AS "source"
ORDER BY
  "source"."count" DESC
LIMIT
  1048575;

spec.title: CAS Usage by Account
spec.description: Shows accounts sorted by CAS (Content Addressable Storage) usage for the selected time period. Uses join transformation to combine ClickHouse analytics with PostgreSQL account data.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
  project_id,
  countIf(action = 'upload') AS total_uploads,
  countIf(action = 'download') AS total_downloads,
  count(*) AS total_operations,
  sumIf(size, action = 'upload') AS upload_bytes,
  sumIf(size, action = 'download') AS download_bytes,
  sum(size) AS total_bytes
FROM cas_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY project_id
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC

SELECT 
  p.id AS project_id,
  a.name AS account_handle
FROM public.projects p
JOIN public.accounts a ON p.account_id = a.id

SELECT
  "Accounts"."name" AS "Accounts__name",
  COUNT(*) AS "count"
FROM
  "public"."bundles"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."projects" AS "Projects" ON "public"."bundles"."project_id" = "Projects"."id"
  LEFT JOIN "public"."accounts" AS "Accounts" ON "Projects"."account_id" = "Accounts"."id"
WHERE
  $__timeFilter("public"."bundles"."inserted_at")
GROUP BY
  "Accounts"."name"
ORDER BY
  "count" DESC,
  "Accounts"."name" ASC;

spec.title: Module cache - remote cache hits over time
spec.description: Remote binary-cache target hits over time (sum of remote_cache_target_hits across runs). Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(ran_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  sum(remote_cache_hits_count) AS "Remote cache hits"
FROM command_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(ran_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Module cache - active projects over time
spec.description: Distinct projects with remote cache hits, and distinct projects with caching enabled, over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(ran_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  uniqExactIf(project_id, remote_cache_hits_count > 0) AS "Projects with cache hits",
  uniqExactIf(project_id, cacheable_targets_count > 0) AS "Projects with caching enabled"
FROM command_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(ran_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Module cache - top accounts by remote cache hits
spec.description: Accounts with the most remote binary-cache hits in the selected range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT project_id,
  sum(remote_cache_hits_count) AS remote_cache_hits,
  countIf(cacheable_targets_count > 0) AS cache_enabled_runs,
  count() AS runs
FROM command_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(ran_at) AND remote_cache_hits_count > 0
GROUP BY project_id
ORDER BY remote_cache_hits DESC

SELECT p.id AS project_id, a.name AS account_handle,
  CASE WHEN a.organization_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Organization' ELSE 'Individual' END AS account_type,
  a.billing_email AS billing_email
FROM public.projects p JOIN public.accounts a ON p.account_id = a.id

spec.title: Xcode cache - CAS operations over time
spec.description: Content-addressable storage upload/download operations over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(inserted_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  countIf(action = 'upload') AS "Uploads",
  countIf(action = 'download') AS "Downloads"
FROM cas_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Xcode cache - CAS data transferred over time
spec.description: Bytes uploaded/downloaded to the compilation-cache CAS over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(inserted_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  sumIf(size, action = 'upload') AS "Upload bytes",
  sumIf(size, action = 'download') AS "Download bytes"
FROM cas_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Xcode cache - active projects over time
spec.description: Distinct projects performing CAS operations over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(inserted_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  uniqExact(project_id) AS "Active projects"
FROM cas_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Builds - build runs over time (CI vs total)
spec.description: Inspected build runs over time, total and CI-only. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(inserted_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  count() AS "Total",
  countIf(is_ci) AS "CI"
FROM build_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Builds - active projects & accounts over time
spec.description: Distinct accounts and projects with inspected builds over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(inserted_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  uniqExact(account_id) AS "Accounts",
  uniqExact(project_id) AS "Projects"
FROM build_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Builds - top accounts by build runs
spec.description: Accounts with the most inspected build runs in the selected range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT account_id,
  count() AS build_runs,
  uniqExact(project_id) AS projects,
  countIf(is_ci) AS ci_build_runs
FROM build_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY account_id
ORDER BY build_runs DESC

SELECT id AS account_id, name AS account_name, billing_email,
  CASE WHEN organization_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Organization' ELSE 'Individual' END AS account_type
FROM public.accounts

spec.title: Bundles - active projects & accounts over time
spec.description: Distinct projects and accounts uploading bundles over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('$bucket', b.inserted_at) AS time, 'Projects' AS label,
  count(DISTINCT b.project_id) AS value
FROM public.bundles b
WHERE $__timeFilter(b.inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1
UNION ALL
SELECT date_trunc('$bucket', b.inserted_at) AS time, 'Accounts' AS label,
  count(DISTINCT p.account_id) AS value
FROM public.bundles b JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = b.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(b.inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY time, label

spec.title: Previews - previews over time
spec.description: Previews created over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('$bucket', inserted_at) AS time, 'Previews' AS label, count(*) AS value
FROM public.previews
WHERE $__timeFilter(inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Previews - active projects & accounts over time
spec.description: Distinct projects and accounts creating previews over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT date_trunc('$bucket', pr.inserted_at) AS time, 'Projects' AS label,
  count(DISTINCT pr.project_id) AS value
FROM public.previews pr
WHERE $__timeFilter(pr.inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1
UNION ALL
SELECT date_trunc('$bucket', pr.inserted_at) AS time, 'Accounts' AS label,
  count(DISTINCT p.account_id) AS value
FROM public.previews pr JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = pr.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(pr.inserted_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY time, label

spec.title: Tests - test runs over time (CI vs total)
spec.description: Test runs over time, total and CI-only. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(ran_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  count() AS "Total",
  countIf(is_ci) AS "CI"
FROM test_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(ran_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tests - active projects & accounts over time
spec.description: Distinct accounts and projects running tests over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(ran_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  uniqExact(account_id) AS "Accounts",
  uniqExact(project_id) AS "Projects"
FROM test_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(ran_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Runners - jobs over time (by outcome)
spec.description: Dispatched runner jobs over time, split by conclusion. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(enqueued_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  count() AS "Total",
  countIf(conclusion = 'success') AS "Success",
  countIf(conclusion = 'failure') AS "Failure",
  countIf(conclusion = 'cancelled') AS "Cancelled"
FROM runner_jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(enqueued_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Runners - adoption: accounts & repositories over time
spec.description: Distinct accounts and repositories dispatching runner jobs over time. Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(enqueued_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  uniqExact(account_id) AS "Accounts",
  uniqExact(repository) AS "Repositories"
FROM runner_jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(enqueued_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Runners - compute minutes over time
spec.description: Total runner compute time over time (sum of started_at to completed_at across jobs). Set Granularity (day/week/month) and widen the time range to see the trend.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(enqueued_at, INTERVAL 1 $bucket) AS time,
  round(sum(if(started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at > started_at, dateDiff('second', started_at, completed_at), 0)) / 60.0, 1) AS "Compute minutes"
FROM runner_jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(enqueued_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Runners - jobs by fleet
spec.description: Runner job volume, repositories and compute time per fleet pool in the selected range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT fleet_name AS fleet,
  count() AS jobs,
  uniqExact(repository) AS repositories,
  countIf(conclusion = 'success') AS success,
  countIf(conclusion = 'failure') AS failure,
  round(sum(if(started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at > started_at, dateDiff('second', started_at, completed_at), 0)) / 60.0, 1) AS compute_minutes
FROM runner_jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(enqueued_at)
GROUP BY fleet_name
ORDER BY jobs DESC

spec.title: Runners - top accounts by usage
spec.description: Accounts with the most dispatched runner jobs in the selected range.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT account_id,
  count() AS jobs,
  countIf(conclusion = 'success') AS success,
  countIf(conclusion = 'failure') AS failure,
  uniqExact(repository) AS repositories,
  round(sum(if(started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at > started_at, dateDiff('second', started_at, completed_at), 0)) / 60.0, 1) AS compute_minutes
FROM runner_jobs
WHERE $__timeFilter(enqueued_at)
GROUP BY account_id
ORDER BY jobs DESC

SELECT id AS account_id, name AS account_name, billing_email,
  CASE WHEN organization_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Organization' ELSE 'Individual' END AS account_type
FROM public.accounts

spec.name: bucket
spec.label: Granularity
spec.description: Time bucket for the over-time panels
